picks.title: 最新Python编程教程19天从入门到精通

explanation.whyMatch: 匹配您的学习目标，符合 综合 难度及中文语言偏好。
explanation.relativeAdvantage: 极简入门指南，快速跑通 Setup 和 Demo，缩短从零到第一个运行代码的时间。
explanation.knownLimitations: 可能会跳过深层计算机系统原理或底层边缘情况的讲解。
explanation.suitableFor: 适合希望通过 tutorial 载体来构建 基础 技能的自学者。
explanation.notSuitableFor: 不适合寻找保姆式视频教学或需要实时互动答疑的初学者。
explanation.alternative: 建议搭配查看替代资源：浏览分类下的其他项目

picks.title: Python 3 文档(简体中文) 3.2.2 documentation

explanation.whyMatch: 匹配您的学习目标，符合 综合 难度及中文语言偏好。
explanation.relativeAdvantage: 官方标准文档，随时保持最新更新，是查阅 API 和核心规范的终极权威参考。
explanation.knownLimitations: 文风较为干瘪冷冽，没有保姆式步骤，不太适合作为绝对新手的入门第一站。

fixtureName: Some JS wants to build websites EN

picks.title: Create a Professional Website with Velo by Wix

explanation.whyMatch: Matches your learning query and fits general difficulty and English language preferences.
explanation.relativeAdvantage: Highly practical, zero-friction getting started guide. Focuses on quick setup and rapid feedback loops.
explanation.knownLimitations: May skip deep software architectural principles or edge cases.
explanation.suitableFor: Self-directed learners wanting a tutorial medium to build basic skills.
explanation.notSuitableFor: Learners seeking passive video walkthroughs or real-time classroom tutoring.
explanation.alternative: Consider alternative material: ASP.NET Core Tutorial For Beginners

picks.title: Introduction to Professional Web Development in JavaScript

explanation.whyMatch: Matches your learning query and fits general difficulty and English language preferences.
explanation.relativeAdvantage: Offers a structured, comprehensive, and theoretically complete curriculum. Ideal for systematically building mental models.
explanation.knownLimitations: Requires high reading stamina; lacks instant browser-based coding playgrounds.
explanation.suitableFor: Self-directed learners wanting a book medium to build basic skills.
explanation.notSuitableFor: Learners seeking passive video walkthroughs or real-time classroom tutoring.
explanation.alternative: Consider alternative material: ASP.NET Core Tutorial For Beginners
